title: T-025 — Session timeout modal + auto-extend (06-a)
prompt:
# T-025 — Session timeout UX

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.1 FR-SC-FE-014, §6 D7
UX: design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md:817-846 §3.23 (overlay)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Deliver the session-timeout modal — appears 30 seconds before personal-mode session expiry — with [Przedłuż] and [Wyloguj] buttons. Kiosk mode (60s idle) skips warning and forces immediate logout per §8.1 FR-SC-FE-014.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/scanner/src/components/session-timeout-modal.tsx` mounted by scanner layout (T-012).
2. Reads expires_at from /api/scanner/session response (T-007); schedules a timer to fire at exp - 30s for personal mode only.
3. [Przedłuż] calls GET /api/scanner/session (sliding refresh); [Wyloguj] POSTs /api/scanner/logout then router.push('/scanner/login').
4. Kiosk mode: no modal, hard redirect to /scanner/login on idle expiration response.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/components/session-timeout-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/components/session-watcher.client.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/session-timeout.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given personal-mode session with exp 30s in the future, when SessionWatcher mounts, then the timeout modal renders within 100ms
2. Given the user clicks [Przedłuż] in the modal, when the response succeeds, then the modal closes and a fresh exp value is recorded; clicking again later still works
3. Given kiosk-mode session and a 401 SC_SESSION_EXPIRED response from /api/scanner/session, when the watcher receives it, then no modal is shown and the page redirects to /scanner/login

## Test strategy
- RED: write session-timeout.test.tsx asserting personal modal + extend + kiosk hard logout before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test session-timeout'

## Risk red lines
- Do not render the modal in kiosk mode
- Do not stack multiple watchers when navigating between scanner pages
- Do not let [Przedłuż] silently fail without surfacing an error

pipeline_inputs.description: Session timeout modal for personal mode (30s warning) + kiosk hard-logout path; mounted in scanner layout.
pipeline_inputs.details: session-watcher.client.tsx schedules a timer at exp-30s based on /api/scanner/session response. Personal mode shows modal with [Przedłuż]/[Wyloguj]. Kiosk mode never shows modal — receiving SC_SESSION_EXPIRED triggers redirect to /scanner/login. Single-instance watcher across scanner pages.
